acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors including the cross-level validator
All four CL-S invariants are implemented as deterministic checks
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) validateSpecImplCrossLevel is exported as a named function. (2) CL-S01 checks bidirectional consistency between spec.implementation_docs and each impl doc's spec_sections. (3) CL-S02 checks that decomposed specs have at least one impl doc. (4) CL-S03 checks that the union of all impl docs' spec_sections covers every H3 heading under Functional Requirements. (5) CL-S04 checks version/status consistency — if spec version incremented, all downstream impl docs must be draft. (6) Function is pure — no I/O, no LLM calls. (7) Returns Ring0Result. PASS if all seven hold. FAIL if any invariant is missing or function is impure.

acceptance_criteria.description: Function signature accepts all required data without file I/O
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) Function takes spec definitions, impl doc definitions, and spec markdown as parameters — all data needed is passed in. (2) Uses extractHeadings from src/parsers/markdown.ts for H3 extraction. (3) Does not import fs, path, or any I/O module. PASS if all three hold. FAIL otherwise.
